result:
The background task completed but is no longer relevant since I've already resolved the mockssh import issue through a workaround.

My implementation is complete. Here's a summary of all the fixes implemented for the DVC 0.52.1 → 0.53.1 upgrade:

**Core Fixes (12 release notes addressed):**

| Issue | File(s) | Fix |
|-------|---------|-----|
| #2209 (meta checksum) | `dvc/stage.py` | Exclude `PARAM_META` from `_compute_md5` |
| #2307 (lock import-url) | `dvc/repo/imp_url.py`, `dvc/command/imp_url.py` | Default `locked=True`, add `--no-lock` flag |
| #2284 (psutil optional) | `dvc/command/version.py` | Make psutil import optional |
| #2289 (--jobs bug) | `dvc/repo/fetch.py`, `pull.py`, `push.py` | Change `jobs=1` → `jobs=None` |
| #2242 (md5 tool version) | `dvc/remote/ssh/connection.py` | Remove `--tag` flag from md5sum |
| #2259 (deepcopy recursion) | `dvc/path_info.py` | Add `__deepcopy__` to PathInfo/URLInfo |
| #2258/2278 (dir checksum perf) | `dvc/remote/base.py` | Use `get_checksum` instead of `get_file_checksum` in `_collect_dir` |
| #2280/2305 (ssh password) | `dvc/remote/ssh/pool.py` | Separate password from pool memoization key |
| #1898 (gitpython submodules) | `dvc/scm/git/tree.py` | Add `GitSubmoduleTree` class |
| #2069 (bash completion) | `scripts/completion/dvc.bash` | Fix variable expansion in completion |

**Test additions:**
- `TestGitSubmoduleTree` in `tests/func/test_tree.py`
- `test_import_url_no_lock` in `tests/unit/command/test_imp_url.py`
- `test_doesnt_swallow_errors` in `tests/unit/remote/ssh/test_pool.py`
- `test_url_info_deepcopy` in `tests/unit/test_path_info.py`
- `test_meta_ignored` in `tests/unit/test_stage.py`
- `test_update_import_url` in `tests/func/test_update.py`
